hero.title: Colombia Tango Festival
hero.subtitle: Experience the passion of tango in Medellín

organizer.title: JORGE NEL GIRALDO
organizer.subtitle: ORGANIZER
bio: I have devoted 40 years to tango. My parents were excellent dancers of the Argentinian Melody. My father was a shoe manufacturer, and for that reason I keep the love for tango, and for shoemaking, deep inside.

The best memories of my tender childhood are always in my mind. As a small child, lying in a little cradle beside my dad's workshop, I watched my father make shoes as he listened to the best tangos of that time. The tango music, as well as the sound of the hammer attaching the shoe soles, are wonderful memories.
At one point in my career as a tango dancer, I got sick and realized, even more profoundly, the fact that my body was the tool for my work.

If I was not physically healthy, I would not have been able to make money from my passion for tango. This is when I considered how to earn an income that did not depend on my body. My father said to me 'you should sell tango shoes'. I thought very hard about it; selling shoes would take a lot of time, and what I really wanted to do was to dance. However, my dad made me realize that I would have to own a business to get an income without needing to depend on my body as a working tool. That is how I started the tango shoe business in 1990.

Today, I thank my father, who encouraged me to use the tools from my childhood. The Mr. Tango Shoes Company is now known throughout the tango world. Because of this, I can spend part of my time dancing tango and dedicate the rest of my time to the shoe manufacturing business.

policy.title: CANCELLATION POLICY
policy.intro: Please take a moment to understand our cancellation policy.

rules.condition: Cancel within one week after your payment
Cancel after one week and up to two months after your payment
Cancel after two months and up to one month before the event
Cancel within the month before the event

policy.note: This policy exists because we must secure hotels, pay for meals, reserve event spaces, schedule tours, and make deposits well in advance. In Colombia, most bookings require full payment or a minimum 50% deposit.
policy.warning: Under no circumstance—illness, accident, emergency, family situation—will refunds be issued beyond the terms stated above.
